# results/ Directory

This directory stores **Exp 2/3 statistical analysis results**.

## Generation script: `cross_domain_analysis.py` (Exp 2/3)

## Directory structure

```
results/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cross_domain_methods_results.json   в†ђ Full statistical results for Exp 2 + Exp 3
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ simple_results.md                   в†ђ Key findings summary (quick reference)
```

---

## `cross_domain_methods_results.json`

**Generated by**: `cross_domain_analysis.py` in the project root  
**Contents**: All statistical metrics for Exp 2 (cross-domain comparison) and Exp 3 (cross-method agreement) in JSON format

### Top-level structure

| Key     | Experiment                  | Contents                                  |
| ------- | --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `exp2a` | Exp 2a -- Category profile  | Gini coefficient + JSD                    |
| `exp2b` | Exp 2b -- Attention entropy | Shannon entropy of receiver head scores   |
| `exp2c` | Exp 2c -- Causal topology   | Causal reach ratio + anchor position dist |
| `exp3`  | Exp 3 -- Method agreement   | Kendall's W / tau / top-k overlap         |

### `exp2a`

```
exp2a
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gini
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gpqa / math
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ values: list[float]   # Gini coefficient per problem (20 values)
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean: float
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ci95: [lo, hi]        # Bootstrap 95% CI
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ permutation_p: float      # Two-tailed permutation test p-value (n=10,000)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cliffs_delta: float       # Cliff's delta effect size
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ effect_size: str          # "negligible" / "small" / "medium" / "large"
в””в”Ђв”Ђ jsd
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ value: float              # Jensen-Shannon Divergence (log2, range [0,1])
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ci95: [lo, hi]            # Bootstrap CI (resampling chunk labels, B=5,000)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ label_freq_gpqa: dict     # Frequency of 8 categories in GPQA
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ label_freq_math: dict     # Frequency of 8 categories in Math
```

### `exp2b`

```
exp2b
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gpqa / math
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ values: list[float]       # Attention entropy per problem (20 values)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean: float
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ci95: [lo, hi]
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ permutation_p, cliffs_delta, effect_size
в””в”Ђв”Ђ interpretation: str           # Metric description (proxy metric note)
```

**Metric description**: Uses the Shannon entropy of per-problem `receiver_head_score` distributions as a proxy for attention concentration. High entropy = multi-broadcast (attention spread across many sentences); low entropy = single-hop (few sentences dominate).

### `exp2c`

```
exp2c
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ causal_reach_ratio
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gpqa / math
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ values: list[float]   # Long-range / short-range influence ratio (20 values)
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean: float
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ci95: [lo, hi]
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ permutation_p, cliffs_delta, effect_size
в””в”Ђв”Ђ anchor_location
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gpqa / math
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ n_anchors: int        # Number of high-importance sentences (z-score > 1.0)
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean_pos: float       # Mean normalized anchor position (0=chain start, 1=chain end)
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ values: list[float]   # Normalized position of each anchor
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mann_whitney_u, mann_whitney_p
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cliffs_delta, effect_size
```

### `exp3`

```
exp3
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gpqa / math
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ domain: str
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ n_problems_used: int      # Problems with data from all three methods
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ kendalls_W
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ values: list[float]   # W per problem
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean: float
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ci95: [lo, hi]
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pairwise_tau
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ m1_m2 / m1_m3 / m2_m3
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean: float       # Mean Kendall's tau across problems
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ values: list[float]
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ci95: [lo, hi]
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ topk_agreement
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ "3" / "5" / "10"
в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 12 / 13 / 23: float   # Pairwise top-k set overlap
в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ 3way: float           # Three-way top-k overlap
в””в”Ђв”Ђ cross_domain_W
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mann_whitney_u, mann_whitney_p
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cliffs_delta, effect_size
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mean_W_gpqa, mean_W_math
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ ci_diff_approx: [lo, hi]
```

**Method mapping**: `m1` = Method 1 (CF-KL, black-box resampling), `m2` = Method 2 (receiver head score), `m3` = Method 3 (causal masking, fixed k=3 forward window mean)
